---- Minecraft Crash Report ----
// OptiFine happened.

Time: 2024-06-01 16:20:00
Description: OptiFine HD U H9 pre1 is incompatible with Forge 47.2.0
    Recommended: Use Embeddium instead of OptiFine on Forge

    ... 18 more

-- MOD forge --
-- MOD optifine HD_U_H9_pre1 --
-- MOD embeddium 0.2.0 --
-- MOD create 0.5.1 --

-- System Details --
Minecraft Version: 1.20.1
Forge Version: 47.2.0
Note: OptiFine is known to be incompatible with many Forge mods. Consider removing it.
